title: Chicken Tagine with Italian Creamy Sauce
description: A twist on traditional Indian cuisine with a creamy Italian sauce added to a classic chicken tagine. The chicken is marinated in spices and yogurt, then cooked in a rich and creamy sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the ginger and garlic and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Add the cumin, coriander, cinnamon, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
6. Stir in the yogurt and heavy cream. Bring to a simmer.
7. Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro (optional).
9. Serve with basmati rice or naan bread.
10. Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
